Reference

All functions

createNodes()

Create Nodes

disparity_filter()

Disparity Filter

find_airport()

Find Airport function

find_carrier()

Find Carrier function

from_to_stats()

From To function

make_net_dir()

Directed network

make_net_und()

Undirected Network

make_net_path()

Path and OD Network

node_stats()

Get node info

import_t100()

Import T-100 Data

import_db1b()

Import Data from DB1B files

net_map()

Plot Skynet

boot_network()

Network bootstrapping

fit_power()

Power Law

summary(<skynet>)

Displays a summary of a skynet object
